title: The Sunny Becomes the Escape Route
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Nami, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Sanji, Unknown person #4 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: The Straw Hats fight to reach the Sunny while Big Mom’s rage turns the sea and islands against them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sweet city, juice river

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The river filled up with cream too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Things aren't looking good.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe we managed to get this thing going!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This stuff's so sweet! I love it:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's so sticky. Gross.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And look, it's making our rudder all slippery.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoa, Whoa! Look out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get out of the way, Mr. Sea Monster!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?! Brook!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look, it's a mermaid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whaaa!?! A Mer- maid?!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, wait. It's a merman.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Come on.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look! Over there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What- ever.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We'll be there soon! To the sunny!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's he doing? Fishing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: South- Western Coast - The seducing Woods

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Eating Fits? Whaddaya mean?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're tan- trums! Until she gets her hands on what she wants to eat,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She rages, with no regard for what or who is around her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: CAAA AKE!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's barely even aware of what she's doing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like her "order" this time around is a wedding cake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which means the fact that she didn't get to eat the cake at the ceremony is probably what set this off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But our plan worked, didn't it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Choe!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But that cake was really good!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You actually ate some during all that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I did, too! It was so yummy:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, whatever! Hurry! We shouldn't be too far from the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that's the thing with this forest! Can't tell if you're going in a straight line or not!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Are we even going the right way?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ah! This river... I've seen it before!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But... I thought that bridge was broken!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If this forest is our enemy,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Then we can't trust anything inside it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These guys are trying their best to trip us up.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which means this place most likely isn't the one we remember.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And Lola's Vivre card doesn't appear to be working on 'em anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's cause Mama herself is literally right behind us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just make sure you don't stop feeding him that bait!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: GOTCHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Whoa!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: YUMMY! YUMMY!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If ZEUS goes back to Mama, we'll definitely never be able to outrun her.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 47 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
